blocked.tag: Add or select at least one #channel
blocked.commentRelay: Select at least one green space to post a comment
blocked.relay: Select a single space or a parent task to create a new task
blocked.selectTask: Select a task to reply to

detail.signin: Sign in to publish this post.
detail.write: Add some text first, then try again.
detail.tag: Add at least one channel tag like #design, or use an included channel filter.
detail.commentRelay: Comments can be posted to any green space.
detail.relay: Choose exactly one green space for a new task, or post from inside an existing task.
detail.selectTask: Open a task first if you want to post a comment.
detail.uploading: Your attachments are still uploading. Posting will unlock automatically when they finish.
detail.uploadFailed: Retry or remove failed attachments before posting.
detail.publishing: This post is already on the way.

attachments.uploadUrlMissing: Attachment upload URL is not configured
attachments.invalidJson: Upload response was not valid JSON
attachments.missingFileUrl: Upload response did not include a file URL
attachments.maxSizeExceeded: File exceeds maximum upload size of {{maxSizeMb}} MB
attachments.waitForUploads: Wait for attachments to finish uploading

hints.composeField: Use #channel tags and @mentions in this field
hints.insertHashtagOpen: Insert hashtag and open channel suggestions

errors.needTag: Add at least one #channel before posting
errors.needSigninModify: Sign in required to modify tasks
errors.statusRestricted: Task updates are restricted to tagged assignees and the creator
errors.selectRelayOrParent: Select a single space or a parent task to create a new task
errors.publishStatusFailed: Failed to publish status update to relays
errors.publishDateFailed: Failed to publish date update to relay
errors.publishPriorityFailed: Failed to publish priority update to relay
errors.taskCreationFailed: Task creation failed. Please try again.
errors.publishSavedForRetry: Failed to publish to Nostr; saved for retry
errors.publishSavedForRetryWithReason: Failed to publish to Nostr; saved for retry ({{reason}})
errors.publishSavedForRetryWithRelayReason: Failed to publish to {{relayUrl}}; saved for retry ({{reason}})
errors.retryRelayMissing: Retry failed: space is no longer configured
errors.retryRejectedByRelay: Retry failed: publish was not accepted by space
errors.retryRejectedByRelayWithReason: Retry failed: publish was not accepted by space ({{reason}})
errors.publishListingStatusFailed: Failed to publish listing status update to relay
errors.locationUnavailable: Location services are unavailable on this device
errors.locationCaptureFailed: Unable to capture your current location
errors.locationPositionUnavailable: Your current location could not be determined
errors.relayVerificationReadFailed: Relay verification failed for reading on {{relayUrl}}. Check signer access and relay permissions.
errors.relayVerificationWriteFailed: Relay verification failed for publishing on {{relayUrl}}. Check signer access and relay permissions.
errors.relayVerificationUnknownFailed: Relay verification failed on {{relayUrl}}. Check signer access and relay permissions.
errors.relayReconnectFailedDeselected: Unable to connect to {{relayDomain}}. It was deselected again.

success.publishedTask: Task published to Nostr and added locally
success.publishedComment: Comment published to Nostr and added locally
success.relayVerificationRead: Relay verification succeeded for reading on {{relayUrl}}
success.relayVerificationWrite: Relay verification succeeded for publishing on {{relayUrl}}

warnings.parentLocalOnly: Parent reference is local-only; publishing task without parent link
warnings.disconnectedSelectedFeeds: Reconnect selected spaces before modifying or posting
warnings.readOnlyParentReplyHidden: This thread is on a read-only space, so replies are disabled here.

publishQueue.retryUnavailable: Select an original space to enable retry
publishQueue.repostHint: Repost to currently selected space relays
publishQueue.repostUnavailable: Select a different space to enable repost
